subcodes.first_line: The Tongue of Eternity, in the Most Great Prison, speaketh these unshakeable words, that perchance the divine fragrances may pervade all [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: لسان قدم در سجن اعظم باینکلمات محکمات ناطق که شاید عرف بیانات الهیه جمیع
subcodes.subjects: @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @knowledge; recognition of God, @love of God, @spiritual emotions and susceptibilities
